title: senna angulata var. angulata
intro: Senna angulata var. angulata is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna angulata var. angulata include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and aiding in the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of capsules, teas, or infusions, although its use should be limited to short-term due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
